title: Hoshikima
description: This mod introduces several practical utility items that enhance vanilla gameplay with streamlined functionality and fluid mechanics
body:
This mod introduces several practical utility items that enhance vanilla gameplay with streamlined functionality and fluid mechanics.

# Items
- Ender Pearl Bundle An efficient storage solution for ender pearls that facilitates quick access and rapid teleportation.

- Firework Thruster A propulsion component designed to augment gliding and flight, offering precise aerial control.

- Large Bucket An expanded version of the standard bucket, capable of holding greater volumes of liquid and reducing refilling frequency.

- Multi-Fluid Bucket A specialized container that supports simultaneous storage of multiple fluid types. It integrates dynamic rendering via data components, allowing visual differentiation of fluid combinations and states.

This suite of items is designed to integrate seamlessly into technical or survival-oriented gameplay, with support for advanced model mapping and component-based logic introduced in modern Minecraft versions.

# Features

Due to the lack of a convenient chain mining mod for recent Minecraft versions, and with FTB Ultimine currently unavailable for 1.21.5, Hoshikima introduces a chain mining feature inspired by FTB Ultimine—Hoshikima Chain Mine (CM).

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1145094faa36379b8a197e8ffe6022d0752e799.png)

With the Modmenu installed, you can configure the HUD display style. The top option provides an FTB Ultimine-like style, while the bottom option offers a display style for the Jade mod (requires Jade to be installed).
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fe476fd1e1392995c52b0eab6ed4f7e438c19a4.png)
## Chain Modes
 
Development was rapid and time was limited, so the mod currently features four chain mining modes. You can quickly switch between them by holding the chain mining key and scrolling the mouse wheel.

- Shapeless: Mines all adjacent blocks of the same type.

- Single Block Tunnel: Mines a 1-block wide tunnel in the direction the player is facing (excluding technical blocks).

- Double Block Tunnel: Mines a 2x1 tunnel in the direction the player is facing.

- Grid Excavation: Mines a 3x3 tunnel in the direction the player is facing.

Durability checks for breaking hard blocks with soft tools have not yet been implemented for the last three modes, but this will be fixed in the future.

## Air Block Skipping
 
In some mining mods, a tunnel can be interrupted by an empty space, causing the chain to stop. Hoshikima CM includes an air skipping function to prevent this.

You can configure the number of air blocks that can be skipped per chain and the total number of skippable air blocks. For multi-block chains, the skippable amount will be incremented as needed.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8ba1b1a05523edd3eb48f39533a6ca129a9ca2c.png)

## Tool Protection

Hoshikima CM protects a player's tools by preventing a chain from starting when a tool's durability falls below a configured threshold. It will also revert the single block excavation.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e7f8a64f5fcd4bc053dc9ce0ab9c96b8c5f9b4e.png)

## Chain Miscellanea
 
Players can change the color of the preview line to a variety of preset options.

You can configure whether to gather experience orbs, which may help with Mixin-related issues on certain platforms.

You can configure whether the preview lines are always visible.

# Other Changes 

The mod's source code reuses some of Jade's visual elements. After version 1.0.2, the mod's license was changed from CC0-1.0 to CC-BY-NC-SA-4.0.
